name: phonon-calculation
description: Calculate phonon properties (band structure, DOS, force constants) for periodic structures using MatterSim and phonopy.

structures.description: One or more fully periodic ASE Atoms objects. Must have pbc=True in all directions. May originate from files on disk (CIF, POSCAR, XYZ, extxyz), ASE bulk builders, inline coordinates, or pymatgen Structure objects.

relax_first.description: Whether to relax the structure before running phonon calculations. Recommended unless the structure is already relaxed.

relax_optimizer.description: ASE optimiser for pre-phonon relaxation (only used when relax_first=true).

relax_fmax.description: Force convergence tolerance for pre-phonon relaxation in eV/Å.

relax_filter.description: Cell filter for variable-cell relaxation before phonon. null keeps cell fixed.

relax_pressure.description: External pressure for pre-phonon cell relaxation.

relax_constrain_symmetry.description: Preserve space-group symmetry during pre-phonon relaxation.

find_prim.description: Whether to find and use the primitive cell for phonon calculation.

amplitude.description: Displacement magnitude for finite-difference force constant calculation, in Angstrom.

supercell_matrix.description: Supercell matrix as [n1, n2, n3] or [[...],[...],[...]]. null for automatic detection.

qpoints_mesh.description: Q-point mesh for Brillouin zone integration as [n1, n2, n3]. null for automatic detection.

max_atoms.description: Maximum atom count for automatic supercell generation. null for automatic setting based on symmetry.

phonon_results.json.description: Combined JSON with metadata, relaxation provenance, and phonon results for all structures.

FORMULA_phonon_dos.png.description: Phonon density of states plot (per structure).

phonopy_params.yaml.description: Phonopy parameters and force constants (per structure).

terminal_summary.description: Formatted summary table printed to the terminal.
